query: sickly yellow green tint photograph unhealthy skin tone
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / sickly_cast — yellow/green sickly tints, jaundice and unhealthy color casts

response.objective_caption: A man with short brown hair and glasses, wearing a dark crew-neck T-shirt, leans forward while gripping a microphone in both hands. His mouth is open wide and his facial muscles are sharply contracted. Beads of sweat are visible on his forehead. The background is mostly dark, with a bright circular stage light visible behind his right shoulder. Red and green stage lighting fall across his face and clothing.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A man with short brown hair and glasses, wearing a dark crew-neck T-shirt, leans forward while gripping a microphone in both hands, his face contorted in an expression of anger or distress with mouth open wide and teeth visible. Beads of sweat cover his forehead. The background is mostly dark with a bright circular stage light behind his right shoulder. Aggressive red and green stage lights clash across his face and shirt, producing a jarringly disharmonious palette with unbalanced hues that feels deliberately unsettling and provocative.
